title: Automating Email -> Monday using outlook
excerpt:
I am currently struggling with email to Monday. 
If I manually forward emails to the board email address it will work as expected however if I use a rule in Outlook to automatically forward the email to the Monday board …

posts.author: PlusMD (Daniel Dennis)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am currently struggling with email to Monday.
If I manually forward emails to the board email address it will work as expected however if I use a rule in Outlook to automatically forward the email to the Monday board email it does not work, the pulses will never get created. I know the rule in Outlook is working as they’re in my sent folder.

Any help on this would be appreciated!

posts.author: pietervanderwulp (Pieter van der Wulp)
posts.cookedHtml: Pretty remarkable still nobody replied (a solution) to this issue. I’ve got the exact same issue. Have you found a solution in the meantime?

posts.author: PlusMD (Daniel Dennis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Unfortunately I still haven’t found a solution to this. I originally thought it was a work domain issue however I have this issue on my personal email also. Currently I am just manually doing this.
Sorry for not being able to help

posts.author: pietervanderwulp (Pieter van der Wulp)
posts.cookedHtml: Okay. In the meanwhile I reached out to Monday Support, hoping they will be able to help me out. If a solution is found, I’ll post it here as well.

posts.author: omerpel (omer peleg)
posts.cookedHtml: Have u found a solution in the mean time?

posts.author: robertlaphil (Robert)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m having this same issue 3 years later. Anyone have a solution?
